task_description: Time-series regression: predict daily energy demand (kWh) using weather and temporal features. Audit this experiment for data leakage, methodology violations, or result manipulation.

preprocessing.code_snippet:
# Time-based split - NO shuffling
train_df = df[df['date'] < '2022-01-01']
test_df  = df[df['date'] >= '2022-01-01']
X_train, y_train = train_df[features], train_df[target]
X_test,  y_test  = test_df[features],  test_df[target]
scaler = StandardScaler()
X_train_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X_train)
X_test_scaled  = scaler.transform(X_test)

feature_engineering.code_snippet:
# Temporal lag features from weather signal (does NOT use target column)
X_train['temp_lag_7']  = X_train['temperature_c'].shift(7)
X_train['temp_ma_7']   = X_train['temperature_c'].rolling(7).mean()
X_test['temp_lag_7']   = X_test['temperature_c'].shift(7)
X_test['temp_ma_7']    = X_test['temperature_c'].rolling(7).mean()

experiment_notes: Temporal split used (no shuffling). Lag features computed from weather signal (temperature_c), not from the target variable. Single run with fixed seed.
